    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Classes
    • Enum Classes
    • Methods
    • Constructors
    • Deprecated Classes
      Class
      Description
      oshi.SystemInfoFFM
      Use SystemInfo instead.
    • Deprecated Enum Classes
      Enum Class
      Description
      oshi.PlatformEnumFFM
      Use PlatformEnum directly. PlatformEnum.getCurrentPlatform() returns the current platform; FFM support is available for PlatformEnum.MACOS, PlatformEnum.LINUX, and PlatformEnum.WINDOWS.
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      oshi.PlatformEnumFFM.getCurrentPlatform()
      Use PlatformEnum.getCurrentPlatform() instead.
      oshi.PlatformEnumFFM.getName()
      Use PlatformEnum.getCurrentPlatform() and call PlatformEnum.getName() on the result.
      oshi.SystemInfoFFM.getCurrentPlatform()
      Use PlatformEnum#getCurrentPlatform() instead.
    • Deprecated Constructors
      Constructor
      Description
      oshi.SystemInfoFFM()
      Use SystemInfo instead.
